original_question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: Penelope, James, Jacob, and Sofia. As Penelope put it, "Sofia is a knave". James was heard saying, "Jacob is a knave if and only if Sofia is a knight". According to Jacob, "If James is a knave then James is a knight". In a statement by Sofia: "Jacob is a knight". So who is a knight and who is a knave?
